label: SES-032 v0.5 slice B build-execution closeout: 1 session, 0 decisions, 0 planning items, 4 references

session.title: v0.5 slice B — engagement schema, access layer, REST API
session.conversation_reference: Claude Code conversation against the slice prompt at PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.5-B-engagement-schema-and-api.md. Second of five v0.5 build slices. Single-commit session landing at e0aa4f7. No transcript preserved per DEC-025.
session.topics_covered:
Seed prompt: PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.5-B-engagement-schema-and-api.md. Five categories of work executed on top of slice A's foundation: engagement dataclass fleshed out from the slice-A stub with to_dict() and from_row() helpers; access-layer repository with eight standard methods against the meta DB pool with full validation per methodology-schema-specs/engagement.md §3.5; REST API surface with eight standard endpoints consuming the slice-A get_meta_db dependency, replacing the slice-A stub healthcheck; JSON snapshot hook that writes to the meta DB regenerate db-export/meta/engagements.json per the v0.3+ DEC-022 pattern; and client extensions with eight new methods on StorageClient mirroring the v0.4 domain client pattern.

Validation per engagement.md §3.5 in the access-layer repository: identifier regex ^ENG-\d{3}$; code regex ^[A-Z][A-Z0-9]{1,9}$ mirroring v1's Client.code constraint; case-insensitive uniqueness on code and name; free status transitions across active/paused/archived; immutable code post-creation; export_dir must be absolute existing writable directory when set; soft-delete semantics with restore round-trip; collision-safe identifier auto-assignment using SAVEPOINT retry per the prefixed-identifier client-side-computation rule.

New modules created: access/engagement.py (eight-method repository); access/meta_exporter.py (write_engagements_snapshot atomic write to db-export/meta/engagements.json per DEC-022 pattern); api/routers/engagements.py (eight standard endpoints with envelope-shape preservation: POST returns 201; PUT/PATCH/DELETE/POST-restore return 200; preserves the slice-A healthcheck for backward compat). Modified: access/engagement_models.py (extended slice-A stub with to_dict() / from_row()); api/schemas.py (added EngagementCreateIn, EngagementReplaceIn, EngagementPatchIn Pydantic models); ui/client.py (eight engagement methods); migration/dogfood_v0_5.py (rewired to write_engagements_snapshot for consistency with slice B's hook).

Test suite: 54 new tests added — 27 access-layer tests covering happy paths, validation rules (code format, name uniqueness, status enum, export_dir), status transitions, immutable code, soft-delete idempotency, restore round-trip, identifier auto-assignment, list ordering, snapshot regeneration; 23 API endpoint tests covering all eight endpoints plus envelope-shape verification, 422 validation, 409 collision, 404 not-found. Full non-UI suite green: 600 passed, 1 skipped (up from 546 at slice A close).

After this slice the engagement REST API is operable end-to-end via direct API calls or external scripts. The CRMBUILDER row created by the slice-A dogfood migration is exercisable via GET / PUT / PATCH / DELETE; new engagement records can be created via POST; identifier auto-assignment works (POST /engagements with engagement_identifier omitted assigns ENG-NNN). No UI exposes the API yet — that lands in slice C.
session.artifacts_produced:
Commit e0aa4f7 on origin/main — v2: v0.5 slice B — engagement schema, access layer, REST API. Created crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/access/{engagement.py, meta_exporter.py}; crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/api/routers/engagements.py. Modified crmbuilder-v2/src/crmbuilder_v2/access/engagement_models.py; api/schemas.py; ui/client.py; migration/dogfood_v0_5.py. Added 50 tests across tests/crmbuilder_v2/access/test_engagement_repository.py and tests/crmbuilder_v2/api/test_engagements_router.py covering all eight endpoints, all validation rules, status transitions, immutable code, soft-delete + restore, identifier auto-assignment with concurrent-insert safety, snapshot regeneration.

Full v2 non-UI suite green at session end: 600 passed, 1 skipped (+54 net vs. slice A close). Lint clean.

No PRD changes; no decisions or planning items written; no version bump.
session.in_flight_at_end: Slice C (engagement management panel UI) is next per the v0.5 implementation plan; will expose the slice-B REST API through a ListDetailPanel subclass with master/detail panes, CRUD dialogs, and the forbid-active-delete behavior per PRD §5.6. Slice prompt at PRDs/product/crmbuilder-v2/prompts/CLAUDE-CODE-PROMPT-v2-ui-v0.5-C-engagement-management-panel.md.
